findings.title: GitHub Actions workflow detected
findings.description: A GitHub Actions workflow file was found.
findings.recommendation: Pin actions by SHA, set least-privilege permissions, and avoid long-lived secrets.

findings.title: Unpinned GitHub Actions detected
findings.description: Floating tags/branches can increase supply-chain risk.
findings.recommendation: Pin third-party actions to a full commit SHA.

findings.title: Unpinned third-party GitHub Action
findings.description: Matched rule from PipeScope rule pack.
findings.recommendation: Pin all third-party GitHub Actions to a full commit SHA to reduce supply-chain risk.

findings.title: Remote script piped to shell in GitHub Actions
findings.description: Matched rule from PipeScope rule pack.
findings.recommendation: Avoid curl|bash patterns; use trusted packages, pinned artifacts, and checksum/signature verification.

findings.title: GitLab CI pipeline detected
findings.description: A GitLab CI configuration file was found.
findings.recommendation: Review protected variables, runner security, and avoid secrets in logs.

findings.title: Weak hardcoded secret value detected
findings.description: A secret-like configuration key is assigned a weak/default value ('secret'), which is insecure.
findings.recommendation: Replace weak/default secrets with strong random values and load them from a secret manager or protected environment variables. Never hardcode secrets in code.

findings.title: Weak hardcoded secret value detected
findings.description: A secret-like configuration key is assigned a weak/default value ('secret'), which is insecure.
findings.recommendation: Replace weak/default secrets with strong random values and load them from a secret manager or protected environment variables. Never hardcode secrets in code.

findings.title: Weak hardcoded secret value detected
findings.description: A secret-like configuration key is assigned a weak/default value ('secret'), which is insecure.
findings.recommendation: Replace weak/default secrets with strong random values and load them from a secret manager or protected environment variables. Never hardcode secrets in code.

findings.title: Hardcoded RSA private key
findings.description: Matched rule PS-SECRET-RSA-001 (CWE-798)
findings.recommendation: Remove hardcoded secret and rotate affected credentials.

findings.title: Base image may match known CVEs
findings.description: Image 'node:24 AS installer' heuristically matched 5 CVE(s) based on product/version search.
findings.recommendation: Validate with an image-level scanner such as Trivy or Grype, then upgrade to a fixed image version or digest.

findings.title: Base image tag not pinned
findings.description: Base images without explicit tags are mutable over time.
findings.recommendation: Pin base image version tag or digest for reproducible builds.

findings.title: Base image tag not pinned
findings.description: Base images without explicit tags are mutable over time.
findings.recommendation: Pin base image version tag or digest for reproducible builds.

findings.title: Container may run as root
findings.description: Running as root increases blast radius if the container is compromised.
findings.recommendation: Create and switch to a non-root user (USER appuser) and drop Linux capabilities where possible.

findings.title: .dockerignore may be incomplete
findings.description: The .dockerignore file exists but may be missing common exclusions.
findings.recommendation: Update .dockerignore to exclude secrets (.env, *.pem, *.key), VCS (.git), and heavy build artifacts (node_modules, dist, build) to reduce leakage and image size.
